headline: Valero Energy Earnings To Skyrocket As Crack Spreads Soar Amid Iran War
summary: Valero earnings are expected to more than triple in Q1 with refining crack spreads surging amid the Iran war. Valero stock rose solidly.

headline: Par Pacific's 2026 Setup Hinges on Rockies Capture Rebound

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Valero Energy (VLO) Upgraded Earnings Forecasts And Refining Margin Strength
summary: In recent weeks, Wall Street analysts have lifted their quarterly earnings forecast for Valero Energy to US$2.97 per share, marking a very large year-over-year increase and reflecting upgraded expectations for its latest results, which are now in the past as of 29 April 2026. This shift in sentiment centers on anticipated improvements in refining margins and throughput volumes, key measures of how efficiently Valero’s refineries convert crude oil into higher-value fuels. With analysts...
